text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I underestimated how much work being your partner would be. Just
look at all this attention I'm drawing.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I think you understood it well enough. You saw that the appeal
of my offer was bigger than the risks involved.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I promise to fulfill my end of the deal. And these lessons until the
Droit won't interfere with your training, so you can rest assured.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Now then! We've shown each other our costumes, so let's see how we
feel in them and practice our dancing.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
First, we'll start by accustoming ourselves to the partner dance.
Normal classroom lessons only focus on winning concert performances.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
But what's different from regular dancing is, of course, that we'll be
doing it with a partner. There's something especially important about
that... Do you know what it is?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Umm... Making sure not to step on each other's tails?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Heh, well, you're not wrong! More specifically, we have to learn to
breathe in time with one another.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
For now, that's all you need to worry about. I'll take the lead. I have a
routine in mind too—ready to try?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: One, two, three, four... One, two, three, four...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Here, can you lean on me a little more? That's it... Just trust me.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Come now, Sky.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
That was excellent! I knew you'd be a fast learner. What else... I think
you'll be able to move more easily once you trust me more.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Are we doing this choreography during the real thing? The dance and the song are just so classical.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
What we'll be doing is the exhibition. Our job is to create a fun
atmosphere before everyone else starts dancing.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Normally the dorm leaders show an example for everyone to follow...
A glamorous waltz always gets everybody in a cheerful mood.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Ohh, so that's why.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hm?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Uh! Nothin'...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Sky, come on, we need to be in sync. Want to try finishing your
thought?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Really, it's nothing important. Just, you know... it feels kinda
ordinary...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Go on.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
It's definitely got a vibrant party feel, and it's a perfect way to
highlight you.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
But... well, I don't know anything about the Droit. It's probably better
to just do it how you want.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: ...All right. What can we do to make it more interesting?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Huh? Ohh, I'm not the expert here. What would I know?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Maybe put in a lift? I could try holding you up and turning.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, that really feels like you, I guess. But maybe we don't need to
worry about making it interesting.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Then what if we did a turn and really nailed it? Turning speed, angle—perfectly in tune.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Um... Actually, what if we don't match each other?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Like this—we could start off doing completely different movements,
throwing the audience for a loop, then click together at just the right
moment... or something.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
There's no way we'll be perfectly in sync with the time we have left,
so might as well show 'em a little surprise instead, you know?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Ah... That's it!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Uh... Well, I mean, easier said than done, right? Now that we've tried
a little, I can tell my movements really aren't up to par.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
And the whole trusting you part... I haven't gotten the hang of that
either. Better to not try anything crazy. We should just focus on the
basics and—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Knock, knock...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Huh? ...Ack!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Ohhh, is that from Spe and the others? This is great.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... Was this your idea? I knew I wouldn't be able to hide being in
the Droit, but still...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: People are getting way too excited, or mad for some reason, or giving me wrestling masks? Not to mention...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
So your plan was to get everyone excited to see me and cut off my
retreat, huh?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: There's no plan! It's all because you're so popular. And how would I know the key to motivating you was your friends?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Haha. So, is everyone coming to the Droit?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Sorry to say, but yep, they're all comin'... Can't believe I invited all my
classmates. This isn't some festival.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: So they're coming... That's great.
